name: Concepts / Libraries - TradingView
snippet: Pine Script® libraries are publications containing functions that can be reused in indicators, strategies, or in other libraries. They are useful to define frequently-used functions so their source code does not have to be included in every script where they are needed.

name: TradingView Codes: The Complete Guide to Pine Script
snippet: Master TradingView codes with this complete guide to Pine Script programming, custom indicators, strategy backtesting, and chart widget embeds. Learn how to write, adapt, and deploy powerful trading tools for analysis and web publishing.
